title: Xavier Optimized
description: A modpack contains mods that improve and optimize the vanilla game experience without changing the game's mechanism.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Y1IekIlCHEs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![00](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c72da3e34ea8fbf66efd83833880b1e1ca9d78bb_0.webp)

**Xavier Optimized** is a **highly optimized Minecraft** modpack designed to deliver **higher FPS gains** than ordinary optimization packs. The modpack's ultimate goal is to **maximize the vanilla survival experience** without altering the game's core mechanics. It features **FPS/MSPT optimization**, **enhanced mod compatibility**, and **survival utility tools**.

[Downloading and using this modpack means that you have agreed to the Terms of Service and Disclaimer.](https://docs.xaviermc.top/wiki/XavierOptimized/disclaimers)

[简体中文](https://www.mcmod.cn/modpack/1209.html) | [Wiki](https://docs.xaviermc.top/)

> Notice: Work in Progress
> 
>This introduction is currently incomplete and actively being updated. Check back later for more details.

---
**⭐Hyper Optimization**

The **Xavier Optimized** modpack includes a wide range of high-performance optimization mods, such as **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **More Culling**, and more, ensuring **maximum efficiency**, **stability**, and **smooth gameplay**. All selected mods are carefully tested to be **safe for both single-player worlds and multiplayer servers**.  

Whether you're running the game on a modern high-end PC or a previous-generation entry-level device, **Xavier Optimized** delivers **significant performance improvements**.

![01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f7c1e4c2865376e474799d2bd42c3ec8eff3be3.png)

![02](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9de8caac51c7ca35c31710dfced666f8232e9dd.png)

---

**🤔FAQ**

>**Q**: Does the modpack support multiplayer?
> 
>**A**: Yes! Xavier Optimized is compatible with most servers and allows vanilla clients to connect seamlessly.

>**Q**: What mods are included in the pack?
> 
>**A**: To see the full list of mods, go to the **Versions** tab, select a version, and scroll down to view the included mods.

>**Q**: Do I need to install the modpack on the server?  
> 
>**A**: No. The modpack is client-side only and works on any server that accepts vanilla clients.
